overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit downtown district of Night City. The player character walks along wet streets and sidewalks past futuristic skyscrapers, digital billboards, and various storefronts including a pizza shop and adult entertainment venue.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city intersection with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: begins walking forward across the yellow striped crosswalk
pedestrians cross path from left to right in front of camera

agents.ego_description: walking across the wet crosswalk toward the sidewalk on the far side

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking across the crosswalk from left to right

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow and black diagonal stripes
tall building with large illuminated screen displaying pink and red imagery
elevated highway structure with colorful neon lights underneath
rain-slicked asphalt reflecting neon lights and building illumination

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a wet city intersection at night, with the camera positioned on a bold yellow-striped crosswalk. Neon lights from surrounding buildings and a large digital billboard illuminate the area as pedestrians cross the street, and the elevated highway overpass looms ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway overpass

events.description: moves from open crosswalk onto sidewalk under the overpass structure
passing under the overpass causes shift from open neon lighting to shadowed artificial light

agents.ego_description: walking along the orange textured sidewalk beneath the overpass, passing various storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian carrying an umbrella walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: distinctive orange diamond-plate textured pedestrian walkway
storefront with illuminated red signage spelling 'PIZZA'
massive concrete and steel support beams of the elevated highway above
ornate black lampposts with warm yellow illumination

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under the elevated highway overpass, entering a semi-covered sidewalk area with distinctive orange textured pavement. The lighting shifts to a mix of shadow and artificial neon glow as the camera passes a pizza shop and encounters a pedestrian with an umbrella walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open downtown street with corporate architecture

events.description: exits the covered area under the overpass into open street with curved glass building
black sedan drives past on the wet street to the left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past the curved glass transit station and green railings

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving down the wet street away from camera

entered.detail: futuristic building with series of curved glass and metal arch structures
green painted steel barriers separating sidewalk from street
high-rise buildings with illuminated windows towering above the street
scattered trash and cardboard littering the orange pavement

segments.scene_description: Exiting the overpass coverage, the scene opens into a wider downtown street dominated by a futuristic curved glass building on the left. Green metal railings line the sidewalk as a black sedan drives past on the wet road, and tall skyscrapers rise in the distance against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: adult entertainment district with neon storefronts

events.description: approaching intensely bright pink and cyan neon signage of adult entertainment venue
passing the XXX adult shop with illuminated mannequin displays in window

agents.ego_description: walking past the brightly lit storefronts including the adult entertainment venue with neon signage

notable_agents.action: person standing near the entrance of the neon-lit club

entered.detail: large vertical sign with bright pink and cyan neon tubing
storefront with purple 'XXX' neon signage and glass windows
closed shop with metal security shutters and graffiti tags
tall digital advertisement screen mounted on building facade

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a narrower street section lined with adult entertainment venues. Intensely bright pink and cyan neon signs illuminate the XXX shop with its mannequin displays, while the camera continues past shuttered storefronts and scattered street debris toward the distant skyscrapers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched downtown district, moving from a wide city intersection into the claustrophobic glow of a commercial side street. It begins on a yellow-striped crosswalk under the glare of massive digital billboards before gliding under the shadow of an elevated highway overpass. As the camera traverses the orange textured pavement of a semi-covered sidewalk past a pizza shop, the lighting shifts from open city brightness to a mix of deep shadows and artificial neon. The scene then opens into a wider thoroughfare featuring a curved glass building and green metal railings, where a black sedan cuts through the reflections on the wet road. Finally, the path narrows into a district of adult entertainment venues, where the atmosphere becomes saturated with intense pink and cyan light from mannequin displays and neon signs.
